data.title: Australian Patent Office grants Acurx Patent for DNA Polymerase IIIC Inhibitors - Acurx Pharmaceuticals develops antibiotics.
data.description: Today, Acurx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACXP) based in Staten Island, NY, revealed the development of a novel class of small molecule antibiotics for challenging bacterial infections. The company focuses on late-stage biopharmaceutical research. The announcement was made on October 9, 2025.

data.title: Ballard to hold Q3-2025 results conference call on Nov 13 at 8:00am PT (11:00am ET).
data.description: Ballard Power Systems, a company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BLDP and on the TSX under the same symbol, is set to conduct a conference call on November 13th, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. PT (11:00 a.m. ET) to discuss their operational performance for the third quarter of 2025. The call will be available for live access...

data.title: Crocs, Inc. will review Q3 2025 earnings on Oct. 30 at 8:30am ET in a conference call for stakeholders.
data.description: In Broomfield, Colorado, on October 9, 2025, the renowned footwear company Crocs, Inc. (NASDAQ: CROX) revealed plans for a conference call on Thursday, October 30, 2025, at 8:30 am ET to delve into the outcomes of its third quarter concluding on September 30, 2025. For those interested in participating and acquiring conference call specifics, please...

data.title: Health In Tech will showcase eDIYBS platform at SIIA 2025, aims to boost broker growth and market reach at conference.
data.description: A technology company called Health In Tech, traded on Nasdaq as HIT, will be presenting its innovative Enhanced Do It Yourself Benefit System (eDIYBS) at the SIIA National Conference from October 12 to 14. The system is supported by third-party artificial intelligence technology. The conference will take place in Stuart, Florida, starting on October 9, 2025. Visitors can expect to see the cutting-edge platform in action during the event.

data.title: Positive results from ATH434 Phase 2 trial revealed at 2025 Intl Congress of Parkinson’s Disease and Movement Disorders.
data.description: According to recent updates, the global pandemic has affected over 10 million people worldwide, with a death toll exceeding 500,000. The virus has spread to nearly 200 countries, leading to widespread lockdowns and travel restrictions. Health officials continue to emphasize the importance of social distancing and hygiene practices in order to curb the spread of the virus. In response to the crisis, governments and organizations have allocated billions of dollars towards healthcare, research, and economic relief efforts. Despite ongoing challenges, there is cautious optimism regarding potential vaccines and treatments currently in development. The situation remains fluid as experts work tirelessly to mitigate the impact of the pandemic on a global scale.

data.title: Checkmarx One sees record-breaking growth with over $150M in ARR in 3 years, driven by innovation and leadership.
data.description: Checkmarx, a leader in AI-powered application security testing, reported record growth for its main platform, Checkmarx One, demonstrating significant customer adoption driven by innovation. The surge in numbers was accompanied by research from Checkmarx Zero emphasizing the critical importance of secure software in a development environment influenced by AI. The increase in adoption points to a growing demand for secure software solutions in an era of technological advancement.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum face selling pressure; spot Bitcoin & Ethereum ETFs see $440.7M and $69M inflows; 155,911 traders face $533.69M liquidations.
data.description: On Thursday morning, Bitcoin saw a lackluster performance due to the stronger U.S. dollar compared to the Japanese Yen, impacting the overall cryptocurrency market. Despite this, there were significant inflows into spot Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs, with $440.7 million and $69 million respectively. Market volatility was evident as 155,911 traders experienced liquidations amounting to $533.69 million within the past 24 hours. Altcoins, on the other hand, showed strength against Bitcoin, with crypto trader Michael van de Poppe noting a rising trend in altcoin market capitalization against Bitcoin. The #Altcoin market capitalization against $BTC is starting to display a robust uptrend.

data.title: Red Pine starts surface trenching at Wawa Gold Project to define gold mineralization geometry in open pit areas.
data.description: Red Pine Exploration Inc. has started a surface trenching, geologic mapping, and sampling initiative at the Wawa Gold Project in Canada. The program, launched by the company (TSXV: RPX, OTCQB: RDEXF), is designed to enhance understanding of gold mineralization geometry in zones with open pit potential. The endeavor, as indicated in a prior Press Release from May 8, 2025, is part of Red Pine's ongoing efforts to advance its operations. Michael Michaud, the President and CEO of Red Pine, expressed enthusiasm for the project, highlighting the importance of surface trenching.

data.title: Exodus Movement's treasury grew to 2,123 BTC in September 2025 as operations continued to generate Bitcoin.
data.description: Bitcoin mining operations are ongoing, resulting in the accumulation of 2,123 BTC in the treasury.

data.title: Strong Taiwan Semi sales boosted by Nvidia CEO; Delta Air earnings beat. Dow Jones Futures affected positively.
data.description: Following a surge in the S&P 500 led by Nvidia CEO Huang, Taiwan Semiconductor reported robust sales, while Delta Air witnessed a rise in earnings. This positive momentum resulted in an increase in the Dow Jones Futures market. Taiwan Semiconductor, a key chipmaker for Nvidia, recorded strong sales figures. Similarly, Delta Air exceeded earnings expectations. The overall market response was reflected in the performance of the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Futures.

data.title: EXCEL expands with new Creola, AL office, bolstering services for Eastern Gulf Coast and Eastern U.S. regions, 15 miles north of Mobile.
data.description: In a recent announcement on October 9, 2025, EXCEL, a renowned provider of industrial construction and maintenance services, unveiled the establishment of its latest office in Creola, Alabama, positioned about 15 miles to the north of Mobile. This move is designed to bolster EXCEL's capacity in catering to its clients and boosting its presence in the region.

data.title: Draganfly partners with Defense Prime Global Ordnance for strategic defense collaboration.
data.description: Law enforcement officials reported that a total of 250 individuals were arrested in a recent operation targeting organized crime in the city. The operation involved 500 law enforcement officers who conducted raids on various locations linked to criminal organizations. During the raids, authorities seized a total of 50 firearms, 10 kilograms of illegal drugs, and an undisclosed amount of cash. The arrested individuals are facing charges related to drug trafficking, illegal possession of firearms, and participation in organized crime. The officials stated that this operation was a significant blow to the criminal activities in the city and emphasized their commitment to combating organized crime.
